_publications._publicationTitle: Influences of RASopathies on Neuroanatomical Variation in Children.

_contextSnippet: In our ROI analysis of subcortical volumes, we compared RASopathies versus TD and found significant group differences after FDR correction in the left and right putamen
details: Successfully identified and quantified subcortical volumes in specific brain regions including putamen, accumbens, caudate, pallidum, hippocampus, thalamus, and amygdala for ROI analysis with significant group differences detected.
